parameters.query:
WITH expected_functions AS (
  SELECT unnest(ARRAY[
    'pii_encrypt','pii_decrypt','check_rate_limit','log_access','raise_security_event',
    'is_ip_blocked','ban_ip','validate_client_token','current_tenant_id'
  ]) AS fname
),
fn_check AS (
  SELECT fname,
    EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pg_proc WHERE proname = fname) AS present
    FROM expected_functions
),
expected_tables AS (
  SELECT unnest(ARRAY[
    'projects','clients','briefings','client_conversations','gdpr_requests',
    'security_events','access_log','rate_limits','ip_blocklist','tenants',
    'system_config','consent_records','client_access_tokens'
  ]) AS tname
),
table_check AS (
  SELECT tname,
    EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name = tname AND table_schema='public') AS present
    FROM expected_tables
),
encryption_check AS (
  SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM system_config WHERE key='encryption_key' AND length(value) > 30) AS encryption_key_present,
         EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM system_config WHERE key='webhook_api_key' AND length(value) > 20) AS webhook_api_key_present,
         EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM system_config WHERE key='architect_email' AND value LIKE '%@%') AS architect_email_set
)
SELECT json_build_object(
  'all_functions_ok', NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM fn_check WHERE present = false),
  'missing_functions', (SELECT array_agg(fname) FROM fn_check WHERE present = false),
  'all_tables_ok', NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM table_check WHERE present = false),
  'missing_tables', (SELECT array_agg(tname) FROM table_check WHERE present = false),
  'encryption_ok', (SELECT encryption_key_present FROM encryption_check),
  'webhook_key_ok', (SELECT webhook_api_key_present FROM encryption_check),
  'architect_email_ok', (SELECT architect_email_set FROM encryption_check),
  'pii_encrypt_roundtrip', pii_decrypt(pii_encrypt('healthcheck_xyz')) = 'healthcheck_xyz',
  'security_dashboard_view_works', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM security_dashboard LIMIT 1),
  'gdpr_view_works', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM gdpr_client_data_view LIMIT 1)
) AS report;
INSERT INTO activity_log (action, agent_name, details) VALUES ('health_check_ok', 'cron_health_check', $1::jsonb);

SELECT raise_security_event(
  'data_breach_suspected'::text,
  'critical'::text,
  'cron'::text, '/cron_health_check'::text, 'health_check'::text, NULL::uuid,
  'Health check FAILED: una o mas pieza criticas del sistema de seguridad no estan disponibles. Revisar inmediatamente.',
  $1::jsonb
) AS event_id;
SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key='architect_email'

parameters.subject: [ARQUITAI CRITICAL] Health check fallido
parameters.message:
=

Sistema en estado degradado

El health check matutino ha encontrado anomalias en la infraestructura de seguridad de ArquitAI.

{{ JSON.stringify($('Run Checks').first().json.report, null, 2) }}

Esto indica que una migracion fallo, una funcion fue dropeada por error, o una tabla critica desaparecio. Revisar inmediatamente.
